name: Ncapriata Di Fave (Fava Bean Puree with Greens)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and remove them from their skins. If the skins cling too tightly, boil them for 5 to 10 minutes and then skin.
2. Place peeled beans in a pot with celery and onion. Add just enough water to cover and bring to a simmer.
3. Add 2 tsp salt, cover, and cook for 20 to 25 minutes or until the beans are very soft. Add more water if necessary.
4. Drain and place in a processor with the 3 tbsp olive oil.
5. Clean the broccoli rabe by peeling off any thick skin covering the larger stems and cut into 2-inch pieces. Rinse the greens well.
6. Bring the water to a boil, add the greens and 1 tbsp salt, cover, and cook until the greens are soft but not mushy, about 5 minutes.
7. Drain. Warm the 3 tbsp olive oil in a skillet and slowly sauté the garlic just enough until it is golden brown and soft. Do not let it burn.
8. Add the greens and swirl them around in well-flavored oil.
9. Serve on a platter, spooning the garlic-infused greens over the favas.
